name: NocoDB
description: No-code platform for database management, self-hosted Airtable alternative
compose:
name: slashnode-nocodb
services:
  app:
    image: nocodb/nocodb:2026.06.1
    container_name: nocodb-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      NC_DB: pg://nocodb-postgres:5432?u=nocodb&p=itworkslocally&d=nocodb
    volumes:
      - app_data-app:/usr/app/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:2183:8080
  postgres:
    image: postgres:18.3-alpine
    container_name: nocodb-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: nocodb
      POSTGRES_USER: nocodb
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: itworkslocally
      PGDATA: /data/pgdata
    volumes:
      - postgres_data-db:/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-app:
    name: slashnode-nocodb_app_data-app
  postgres_data-db:
    name: slashnode-nocodb_postgres_data-db
